title: [spec-compliance] Schnorr48 and security not fully constant-time or per spec
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/schnorr48.c, rust/lichen-link/src/schnorr.rs, key loading miss exact 48-byte Schnorr per draft-lichen-schnorr-00.md Appendix A test vectors, constant-time, key rotation on EPO/SEQ exhaustion. See project-LICHEN-s3t5
notes: Fixed key loading (epoch set, derive_keypair reuse for spec/test vector match), constant-time s-check in verify_frame per draft §5.3. Rust compliant. Commit b2c0ae3b3
close_reason: Spec compliance achieved: exact test vector match, constant-time ops per draft §5.3, key loading/epoch/derivation fixed, EPO/SEQ exhaustion handling aligned. All tests (Python schnorr48, Rust vectors, C oracle paths) pass. No test changes.
